explanations.sentence: 1,646 amenity density (1,320 restaurants + 290 cafes + 36 schools). good — Above average of GTA neighborhoods (p10=113, p90=1,852). adds 12.4 of 18.0 possible points to your total.

anomalies.message: Transit stops in 3km is significantly above normal: 890 stops (baseline 63 stops, 104.2σ)
Restaurants in 3km is significantly above normal: 1320 places (baseline 240 places, 69.7σ)
Cafés in 3km is significantly above normal: 290 places (baseline 51 places, 33.5σ)

Schools in 3km is significantly above normal: 36 places (baseline 12 places, 6.9σ)
